hero.title: ODT to PDF
hero.subtitle: Convert ODT files from LibreOffice/OpenOffice to PDF.

features.title: LibreOffice compatibility
features.text: Convert ODT files without installing LibreOffice.

about_formats: ODT is the OpenDocument Text format used by LibreOffice.
PDF is suitable for sharing and printing documents.

faq.question: Do I need LibreOffice installed?
faq.answer: No — server-side conversion is handled by the engine when available.
